word: G608 - ἀποκλείω - apokleíō - ap-ok-li'-o - Shut up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποκλείω

- Transliteration: Apokleio

- Phonetic: ap-ok-li'-o

- Definition:

1. to shut up

- Origin: from G575 and G2808

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and G2808; to close fully: - shut up.
